category.scope_note: Household refrigerating appliances comparison: China domestic compliance vs Cameroon ANOR conformity, energy labelling, and import inspection requirements.

title.en: China-to-Cameroon Household Refrigerator Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国家用电冰箱进入喀麦隆：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國家用電冰箱進入喀麥隆：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of Chinese household refrigerator compliance (CCC, GB 4706.13, GB 12021.2) against Cameroon ANOR conformity assessment (PECAE import inspection), NC/IEC 60335-2-24 safety standards, energy labelling, R-600a refrigerant handling, and French-language documentation requirements.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国家用电冰箱合规（CCC、GB 4706.13、GB 12021.2）与喀麦隆ANOR合格评定（PECAE进口检验）、NC/IEC 60335-2-24安全标准、能效标识、R-600a制冷剂处理及法语文件要求差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國家用電冰箱合規（CCC、GB 4706.13、GB 12021.2）與喀麥隆ANOR合格評定（PECAE進口檢驗）、NC/IEC 60335-2-24安全標準、能效標識、R-600a製冷劑處理及法語文件要求差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, conformity-assessment determination, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, and distributors should verify current Cameroon legislation, ANOR standards (NC), PECAE conformity-assessment requirements, energy-labelling provisions, and import-inspection procedures with qualified professionals before shipment or market placement.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、合格评定裁定、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商和经销商在出货或投放市场前，应与合格专业人士核验现行喀麦隆法律、ANOR标准（NC）、PECAE合格评定要求、能效标识条款及进口检验程序。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、合格評定裁定、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商和經銷商在出貨或投放市場前，應與合格專業人士核驗現行喀麥隆法律、ANOR標準（NC）、PECAE合格評定要求、能效標識條款及進口檢驗程序。

answer_first.en: Chinese household refrigerator manufacturers face several Cameroon market-access gaps: (1) conformity assessment under the PECAE programme (Programme d evaluation de la conformite avant embarquement) — pre-shipment inspection and a Certificate of Conformity are required for regulated products before clearance at Douala or Kribi; (2) standards alignment to ANOR-adopted NC standards based on IEC 60335-2-24 for safety, plus energy-efficiency labelling/MEPS where the national energy programme applies; (3) French-language product documentation, instructions, and labelling; (4) an in-country importer of record. R-600a refrigerant is well-positioned, and Cameroon shares 220 V / 50 Hz single-phase nominal voltage with China, reducing voltage-frequency rework versus other markets. Cameroon does not operate an EU-style horizontal RoHS, battery, or outdoor-noise regime, so those EU-specific obligations do not apply.
answer_first.zh: 中国家用电冰箱制造商面临多项喀麦隆市场准入差距：（1）依据PECAE计划（装运前合格评定计划）的合格评定——受监管产品在杜阿拉或克里比清关前须完成装运前检验并取得符合性证书；（2）标准对接ANOR采用的基于IEC 60335-2-24的NC安全标准，以及在国家能效计划适用时的能效标识/最低能效标准（MEPS）；（3）法语产品文件、说明书及标识；（4）境内注册进口商。R-600a制冷剂具备良好条件，且喀麦隆与中国同为220 V/50 Hz单相标称电压，相较其他市场可减少电压频率改造。喀麦隆未实施欧盟式横向RoHS、电池或室外噪声制度，故上述欧盟特定义务不适用。
answer_first.zht: 中國家用電冰箱製造商面臨多項喀麥隆市場准入差距：（1）依據PECAE計畫（裝運前合格評定計畫）的合格評定——受監管產品在杜阿拉或克里比清關前須完成裝運前檢驗並取得符合性證書；（2）標準對接ANOR採用的基於IEC 60335-2-24的NC安全標準，以及在國家能效計畫適用時的能效標識/最低能效標準（MEPS）；（3）法語產品文件、說明書及標識；（4）境內註冊進口商。R-600a製冷劑具備良好條件，且喀麥隆與中國同為220 V/50 Hz單相標稱電壓，相較其他市場可減少電壓頻率改造。喀麥隆未實施歐盟式橫向RoHS、電池或室外噪聲制度，故上述歐盟特定義務不適用。

editorial_controls.change_policy: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be set to true. Official regulator, standards body, or primary legal source preferred.
